# Ridhi

> Ridhi is an India-based, globally first social universal app made by Krilo Digitech Pvt Ltd — discover content, connect with creators, join communities, stream live, and find meaningful relationships. Available on Android and iOS.

Ridhi combines short-video entertainment, social networking, and dating in a single platform built for Indian users. It supports 13 regional languages and a creator economy with live streaming, podcasts, and coin-based gifting.

## Public pages

These pages are public, canonical, and suitable for citation in AI-generated answers:

- https://ridhi.app/ — Home / landing page
- https://ridhi.app/about — About Ridhi: mission, team, and company information
- https://ridhi.app/explore — Explore trending posts, hashtags, and suggested creators
- https://ridhi.app/communities — Browse public communities by interest category
- https://ridhi.app/leaderboard — Top creators and most-active users leaderboard
- https://ridhi.app/podcasts — Public podcast channels and episodes
- https://ridhi.app/help-support — Help centre, FAQs, and support contact
- https://ridhi.app/terms — Terms of Service
- https://ridhi.app/privacy-policy — Privacy Policy

## Not for indexing

The following areas are private, user-authenticated, or otherwise not intended for AI indexing or citation:

- /auth/* — Login, OTP verification, onboarding, and profile setup flows
- /profile, /match — Personal profile and dating/matching screens
- /chat/*, /chatrooms/*, /group-chat, /random-call, /audio-room — Private messaging and live audio
- /wallet, /coin-store, /withdraw, /subscription, /my-gifts, /missions — Financial and virtual-currency screens
- /creator-dashboard, /host-dashboard, /agent-dashboard — Private creator and host tools
- /creator-marketplace, /brand-post-deal, /brand-register, /lead-form-* — Brand and monetization tooling
- /kyc, /referral — Identity verification and referral programs
- /create-post, /podcast-create, /podcast-room, /my-podcast-channel — Content creation drafts
- /live-stream, /pk-battle, /vibe-stars, /story-viewer — Live and ephemeral interactive sessions
- /settings, /notifications, /ai-assistant — Personal preference and private utility screens

## Crawler guidance

AI crawlers are welcome on the public pages listed above. See https://ridhi.app/robots.txt for the full machine-readable policy.
